page.title: Storage
page.subtitle: Keep every green lot in spec from the bodega to the sale.

summary.locationsSub: {count, plural, one {# bodega tracked} other {# bodegas tracked}}

empty.title: No storage locations yet
empty.description: Add a bodega or cold room on the right, then log a temperature, humidity, and water-activity reading to start tracking it.

certs.title: Storage certificates
certs.subtitle: Each one is bound to the exact readings behind it.
certs.empty: No certificates issued yet. Pick a stored lot above and issue one once it has readings on file.

console.title: Log & certify
console.subtitle: Manual readings are the $0 path. A future sensor posts to the same place.

fields.locationCodeHint: Used on the certificate, e.g. BOD-1

console.issuedCert: Certificate issued. It's in the log below.
console.awHint: Green coffee is safe at aw 0.65 or below.

errors.locationCodeRequired: Give the location a short code.
errors.bandOrder: The minimum can't be above the maximum.
errors.readingEmpty: Enter at least one of temperature, humidity, or water activity.
errors.lotRequired: Pick a green lot to certify.
errors.windowRequired: Set the from and to dates for the window.
errors.windowOrder: The window's end has to be after its start.
errors.generic: Could not save that. Check the numbers and try again.
